title: DISC Identity
shows: The pattern your state is moving through right now.
means: DISC identifies the state pattern. It does not reduce the person to the pattern.
summary: Some traits move louder under pressure. Others move quietly beneath the surface.
notice: Notice which trait keeps taking the lead when decisions, stress, or uncertainty appear.
z9_path: This is the first doorway into the Z9Coach matrix system.

title: Developmental Stages
shows: The life pressure surrounding the current state.
means: Behavior is not random. It is shaped by history, pressure, and the stage of life you are moving through.
summary: Sometimes the state you feel and the state you show are not fully the same.
notice: Notice where the current stage feels stretched, guarded, uncertain, or ready to grow.
z9_path: This moves the report from personality into developmental context.

title: Motivation Systems
shows: What helps movement return when energy becomes scattered, pressured, or stalled.
means: Motivation becomes more stable when the next move matches the current state.
summary: The next move should create motion, not pressure.
notice: Notice whether the suggested action feels forced or naturally reachable.
z9_path: This becomes the bridge into missions, routines, and ReSpark pathways.

title: Cognitive Dissonance
shows: Where inner tension may be splitting thought, behavior, emotion, or identity.
means: Contradiction is not failure. It is often the place where the next shift begins.
summary: Some patterns protect the person long after the original pressure has passed.
notice: Notice where the current state feels divided, overcontrolled, withdrawn, or overstretched.
z9_path: This is where CoachFree begins identifying friction instead of hiding it.

title: Self-Actualization
shows: What the current state may be trying to become beneath the visible behavior.
means: CoachFree is a mirror, not a cage.
summary: The report is meant to reveal movement, not trap the user inside a label.
notice: Notice what feels most alive, honest, restrained, or unfinished right now.
z9_path: This opens the deeper identity layer behind the DISC signal.

title: Social Learning
shows: How environments, relationships, and repeated experiences shaped the current state.
means: Some patterns were practiced long before they were chosen.
summary: People often repeat what helped them survive before they learn what helps them grow.
notice: Notice which environments strengthen the current state and which ones distort it.
z9_path: This prepares the bridge into narrative interpretation and PType movement.

title: Zone of Proximal Development
shows: The next reachable step between the current state and the next level of movement.
means: Growth works best when the step is challenging enough to matter, but safe enough to begin.
summary: Small consistent movement often changes more than dramatic pressure.
notice: Notice whether the next move creates clarity, resistance, hesitation, or relief.
z9_path: This becomes the pacing layer for Lite, coaching, and recursive progression.

title: Spiral Harmony
shows: How traits, pressure, stage, rhythm, and action begin forming recurring patterns.
means: The state is not static. It moves in cycles, spirals, repetitions, and shifts.
summary: What repeats often reveals more than what appears once.
notice: Notice whether the current pattern feels stabilizing, repeating, escalating, or preparing to change.
z9_path: This connects the snapshot to the larger Z9Coach spiral system.

title: Resonance & Recursion
shows: How the current snapshot can become part of a larger self-awareness pattern over time.
means: State becomes clearer when it is revisited, reflected on, and compared across moments.
summary: The goal is not perfect self-definition. The goal is clearer recognition.
notice: Notice what should be observed again later instead of judged immediately.
z9_path: This is the bridge from CoachFree into Lite tracking, Pro recursion, and deeper state visibility.
